title: Seafoam's Dyeable Blocks - Biomes O Plenty Compatibility
description: Expansion for Seafoam's Dyeable Blocks, adding full RGB color support for some blocks within Biomes O Plenty!
body:
# Seafoam's Dyeable Blocks - Biomes O Plenty Compatibility

![Seafoam's Dyeable Blocks X Biomes O Plenty](https://i.imgur.com/7EEDKS2.png)

### ***Requires [Seafoam's Dyeable Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/seafoams-dyeable-blocks) and [Biomes O Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty)***
  
### Check out the page for [Seafoam's Dyeable Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/seafoams-dyeable-blocks) for more info on how to get started!  

![Paintbrush_Red](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/124807123/228613926-4e2749dd-f810-41e0-9927-5608387d6021.png)
![Paintbrush_Orange](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/124807123/228614216-874c97d2-ea53-49ac-ba1c-271c1c892b8c.png)
![Paintbrush_Yellow](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/124807123/228613939-0216cdfe-26b9-49f7-bbc3-7688e6d7f3df.png)
![Paintbrush_Green](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/124807123/228613950-c1c84ff3-1e14-40b1-85ae-8539733e182a.png)
![Paintbrush_Blue](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/124807123/228613964-939470c7-5317-4a9b-abac-a1838a13e99a.png)
![Paintbrush_Purple](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/124807123/228614264-aa7b1340-846e-4709-9373-fc346e79a9c9.png)   
  
<details> 
<summary>Supported Blocks</summary>  

- All variants of Sandstone Blocks, Stairs, and Slabs
- All variants of Wood Planks, Stairs, and Slabs
- Brimstone

*It's just the basics right now, but there's a lot more Biomes O Plenty blocks coming when Seafoam's Dyeable Blocks 1.4.0 comes out!*
</details>
